name: Austria
avoid: Crowds at Hallstatt in peak summer

cities.name: Vienna
cities.notes: Schonbrunn Palace, Kunsthistorisches Museum, coffee house culture and opera

cities.name: Salzburg
cities.notes: Mozart's birthplace, Hohensalzburg fortress and Sound of Music scenery

cities.name: Innsbruck
cities.notes: Golden Roof, Nordkette cable car and gateway to Tyrolean ski resorts

cities.name: Hallstatt
cities.notes: Postcard lakeside village with salt mine and Dachstein ice cave

cities.name: Graz
cities.notes: Schlossberg clock tower, Kunsthaus bubble and Styrian pumpkin oil
